title: DN31 3SW, Young’s Seafood Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/BT3552IW/V006
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Young’s Seafood Limited   Installation name: South Quay Coated Factory   Permit number: EPR/BT3552IW/V006   "
